basic_details.job_title: DSWO Ranipet Gender Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: District Social Welfare Office Ranipet (DSWO Ranipet)
basic_details.short_information: District Social Welfare Office Ranipet (DSWO Ranipet) Recruitment 2026: District Social Welfare Office Ranipet has released the official notification for 2 Gender Specialist posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate in social work / other social disciplines
qualification.details: Graduate in social work / other social disciplines. Post-graduates will be preferred.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

physical_eligibility.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the DSWO Ranipet Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. | Download DSWO Ranipet Gender Specialist Job 2026 Notification PDF

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://ranipet.nic.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download DSWO Ranipet Gender Specialist Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: https://ranipet.nic.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 27-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: DSWO Ranipet Gender Specialist Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the DSWO Ranipet Gender Specialist recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to receive the application for the Gender Specialist post is 27th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the office before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Gender Specialist post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the Gender Specialist position by the District Social Welfare Office Ranipet.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Gender Specialist role?
faq.answer: Candidates must hold a Graduate degree in social work or other social disciplines. Post-graduates are preferred for this role.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Gender Specialist position?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Gender Specialist post will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 21,000.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the DSWO Ranipet Gender Specialist recruitment is offline. Candidates need to send their applications via post.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The Gender Specialist position is on a contractual basis.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of District Social Welfare Office Ranipet, which is ranipet.nic.in.

faq.question: Q9. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and educational certificates with the application form.

faq.question: Q10. What is the selection process for the Gender Specialist post?
faq.answer: The selection process details are not explicitly mentioned in the provided data and candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for complete information.
